name: The Price
overview: As a last resort to afford her son’s cancer treatment, a widowed mother asks her manager for money, but the latter poses one condition: she must spend the night with him.

trailers.title: Al Thaman Title Song: Elissa - Ma Tendam 3a Shi | اغنية مقدمة مسلسل الثمن: اليسا - ما تندم ع شي
